— Vgl. aprajas.

results.rendered_html:
apraja a.
1 Without progeny, childless; śocyaṃ maithunamaprajaṃ  Chāṇ. 57. 
2
(pb) Unborn.
3 Unpeopled.
— jā Having no child, not giving birth to children, not prolific.
